zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Salvain I於1226年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Gerard Salvain I26歲，母親Joan Baseville-18歲。他於大約1248年與Sybil de Thirkelby在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1300年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Salvain I于1226年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Gerard Salvain I26岁，母亲Joan Baseville-18岁。他于大约1248年与Sybil de Thirkelby在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1300年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Salvain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Emile, Fernand, Jacques, Michel, Pierre, Andre, Armand, Benoit, Fernande, Francois, Gardy, Germain.

French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the French personal name Sylvain, from Latin Silvanus (a derivative of silva ‘forest, wood’), bestowed in honor of various minor early Christian saints. This surname is most common in Haiti.

History: Pierre Sylvain dit Larosée from Saintes in Charente-Maritime, France, married Jeanne Périllard in Montreal, QC, in 1720. — In North America, this surname was originally also a secondary surname or dit (‘also called’) name, borne by Pierre Veau dit Sylvain (a son of Sylvain Veau from Valençay in Indre, France), who married Catherine Racine in Beaupré, QC, in 1722.

variants.name: Sylvan
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name derived from the Latin adjective silvanus ‘pertaining to a wood or forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘forest, wood’), used as a translation of the Swedish name element skog ‘forest’.
West Indian (Trinidad and Tobago, Grenada): from the personal name Sylvan, from Latin Silvanus (see Sylvain ).

variants.name: Salvant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cyrille, Lucien, Michel.
French: variant of Sauvant, from an old vernacular form of the personal name Sylvain .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Salvain I was born in 1226, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Gerard Salvain I, was 26 and his mother, Joan Baseville, was -18. He married Sybil de Thirkelby about 1248, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1300, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Salvain I est né en 1226, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Gerard Salvain I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Baseville, avait -18 ans. Il a épousé Sybil de Thirkelby environ 1248, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1300, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Salvain I 1226 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard Salvain I 26 und seine Mutter Joan Baseville -18. Er hat um 1248 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sybil de Thirkelby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1300 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Salvain I è nato il nel 1226 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Gerard Salvain I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan Baseville, aveva -18 anni. Lui sposato Sybil de Thirkelby circa 1248, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1300, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Salvain Iが1226年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gerard Salvain Iは26歳，母Joan Basevilleは-18歳であった。約1248年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSybil de Thirkelbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1300年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Salvain I(이)가 1226년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard Salvain I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Baseville(은)는 -18세였다. 그는 대략 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sybil de Thirkelby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Salvain I nasceu em 1226, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gerard Salvain I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Baseville, tinha -18 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil de Thirkelby aproximadamente 1248, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1300, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Salvain I родился в 1226 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gerard Salvain I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Baseville, -18. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil de Thirkelby около 1248 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1300 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.
